---
title: "Oceňovanie opcií — Dashboard"
author: "Ian Spika"
lang: sk
format:
  dashboard:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
    orientation: columns
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
bs_call <- function(S0, K, r, sigma, T_) {
  d1 <- (log(S0/K) + (r + 0.5*sigma^2)*T_) / (sigma*sqrt(T_))
  d2 <- d1 - sigma*sqrt(T_)
  S0*pnorm(d1) - K*exp(-r*T_)*pnorm(d2)
}

mc_call <- function(S0, K, r, sigma, T_, n, seed = 42) {
  set.seed(seed)
  Z  <- rnorm(n)
  ST <- S0 * exp((r - 0.5*sigma^2)*T_ + sigma*sqrt(T_)*Z)
  d  <- exp(-r*T_) * pmax(ST - K, 0)
  list(est = mean(d), se = sd(d)/sqrt(n))
}

S0 <- 100; K <- 100; r <- 0.05; sigma <- 0.20; T_ <- 1
C_bs <- bs_call(S0, K, r, sigma, T_)
mc100k <- mc_call(S0, K, r, sigma, T_, n = 100000)
diff_abs <- abs(mc100k$est - C_bs)
```

## Column {width=30%}

### Row {height=33%}

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Black-Scholes cena"
list(
  icon  = "calculator",
  color = "primary",
  value = sprintf("%.4f", C_bs)
)
```

### Row {height=33%}

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Monte Carlo odhad (n = 100 000)"
list(
  icon  = "dice-5",
  color = "info",
  value = sprintf("%.4f", mc100k$est)
)
```

### Row {height=34%}

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Absolútna odchýlka MC od BS"
list(
  icon  = "graph-down",
  color = "success",
  value = sprintf("%.4f", diff_abs)
)
```

## Column {width=70%}

### Row {height=55%}

```{r}
#| title: "Konvergencia MC odhadu k Black-Scholesovej cene"
set.seed(2026)
n_max <- 50000
Z  <- rnorm(n_max)
ST <- S0 * exp((r - 0.5*sigma^2)*T_ + sigma*sqrt(T_)*Z)
disc <- exp(-r*T_) * pmax(ST - K, 0)
cm <- cumsum(disc) / seq_along(disc)
cv <- (cumsum(disc^2) - seq_along(disc)*cm^2) / pmax(seq_along(disc) - 1, 1)
cse <- sqrt(cv / seq_along(disc))
idx <- seq(100, n_max, by = 50)

plot(idx, cm[idx], type = "l", lwd = 1.5, col = "steelblue",
     ylim = c(C_bs - 1.2, C_bs + 1.2),
     xlab = "počet simulácií n", ylab = "odhad ceny opcie",
     main = "")
polygon(c(idx, rev(idx)),
        c(cm[idx] - 1.96*cse[idx], rev(cm[idx] + 1.96*cse[idx])),
        col = adjustcolor("steelblue", 0.2), border = NA)
abline(h = C_bs, lty = 2, lwd = 1.2)
legend("topright", c("MC odhad", "95 % CI", "BS hodnota"),
       col = c("steelblue", adjustcolor("steelblue", 0.4), "black"),
       lty = c(1, 1, 2), lwd = c(1.5, 6, 1.2), bty = "n")
```

### Row {height=45%}

```{r}
#| title: "Konvergencia: tabuľka pre rastúce n"
ns <- c(1e2, 1e3, 1e4, 1e5, 1e6)
tab <- do.call(rbind, lapply(ns, function(n) {
  res <- mc_call(S0, K, r, sigma, T_, n, seed = 2026)
  data.frame(
    n        = n,
    odhad    = res$est,
    se       = res$se,
    odchylka = abs(res$est - C_bs)
  )
}))
knitr::kable(
  tab,
  col.names = c("n", "Odhad MC", "Štand. chyba", "|MC − BS|"),
  digits    = 5,
  align     = "rrrr"
)
```
